name: Alex Chen
title: AI Researcher & Full-Stack Developer
tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of machine learning and software engineering.
bio: I'm a Computer Science student passionate about pushing the boundaries of artificial intelligence. My research focuses on deep learning architectures and their applications in natural language processing and computer vision. When I'm not training models, I'm building full-stack applications that solve real-world problems.

education.details: Focus: Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision

goals: To develop AI systems that are not only powerful but also interpretable, fair, and accessible to everyone.
